# Hidden Potential Skills

## About
Hidden Potential Skills is a life skills training organisation founded by Supreet Kaur, based in Dwarka, Delhi. We offer NLP-based programs for students, professionals, women, aspiring trainers, schools, and corporates across Delhi NCR.

## Founder
Supreet Kaur — Certified NLP Practitioner, Harvard-affiliated Life Skills Certification, Masters in Psychology, Certified Graphologist (American Board), Josh Talks Speaker, Creator of An Enlightened Learner program. 14+ years experience. 5000+ individuals trained. 200+ trainers certified. MSME registered. Skill India affiliated.

## Location
D-802, Palm Court Apartment, Plot 3, Sector 19B, Dwarka, New Delhi 110075
Serves: Delhi, Noida, Gurgaon, Faridabad, and Online across India
Phone: +91-9899209335
Email: info@hiddenpotentialskills.com
Hours: Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 7 PM IST

## Programs
- An Enlightened Learner (signature student program, ages 10-18)
- Communication Mastery (public speaking, interpersonal skills)
- Self Mastery for Women (empowerment for women 28+)
- Train the Trainer Certification (3-month professional certification)
- Art Therapy for Healing (creative therapeutic expression)

## Services
- NLP Coaching (individual sessions with Supreet Kaur)
- Confidence Building
- Communication Skills Training
- Study Skills & Learning Techniques
- Stress Management
- Emotional Intelligence Training
- Goal Setting & Achievement
- Career Guidance & Planning
- Corporate Workshops (team training at client premises)

## Audiences
- Students and Young Adults (ages 10-25)
- Working Professionals
- Women seeking empowerment
- Aspiring Life Skills Trainers
- Schools and Educational Institutions (NEP 2020 aligned)
- Corporate Organizations

## Key Differentiators
- NLP-based scientific methodology, not generic motivation
- Structured developmental pathways (3-12 months), not one-day workshops
- Pre and post assessment for measurable outcomes
- MSME registered, Skill India affiliated
- 14+ years experience with 5000+ trained
- Available in-person (Dwarka, Delhi), online, and on-site
